POMDPPlanners

Contents:

  • API Reference
POMDPPlanners
  • <no title>
  • View page source

Test script to verify all usage examples from ALL environment classes work correctly.

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.main()[source]

Run all environment class examples.

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_all_planners_usage_examples()[source]

Test usage examples from all planner classes.

Purpose: Validates that all major planner classes can be created and used correctly

Given: TigerPOMDP environment, CartPolePOMDP environment, and various planner configurations When: POMCP, SparseSampling, and PFT-DPW planners are created and actions are selected Then: All planners return valid actions from their respective action spaces and have proper run_data attributes

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_all_simulations_class_examples()[source]

Test usage examples from simulations classes.

Purpose: Validates that all simulation-related classes can be used correctly for running episodes and computing statistics

Given: SanityPOMDP environment, POMCP planner, and simulation infrastructure When: Episode running, SimulationsAPI creation, and statistics computation are tested Then: Episode runs successfully, API is created with proper methods, and statistics are computed correctly

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_all_supporting_class_examples()[source]

Test all supporting class examples with comprehensive validation.

Purpose: Validates that all supporting classes (transition models, observation models, distributions) work correctly

Given: Various environment supporting classes including SanityPOMDP, TigerPOMDP, CartPolePOMDP, MountainCarPOMDP, PushPOMDP, SafeAntVelocityPOMDP, and LightDarkPOMDP When: Transition models, observation models, and initial distributions are created and tested Then: All models return correct samples, probabilities, and distributions according to their specifications

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_cartpole_pomdp_main_example()[source]

Test the main CartPolePOMDP class example.

Purpose: Validates that CartPolePOMDP environment can be created and basic functionality works correctly

Given: A CartPolePOMDP environment with discount_factor=0.99 and noise covariance matrix When: Initial state sampling, action application, reward calculation, and terminal state detection are tested Then: Returns 4D numpy array state, valid actions (0 or 1), float reward, and boolean terminal state flag

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_continuous_light_dark_pomdp_discrete_actions_example()[source]

Test the ContinuousLightDarkPOMDPDiscreteActions class example.

Purpose: Validates that ContinuousLightDarkPOMDPDiscreteActions environment can be created and basic functionality works correctly

Given: A ContinuousLightDarkPOMDPDiscreteActions environment with goal_state=[10,5], start_state=[0,5] When: Action space verification, discrete action selection, and reward calculation are tested Then: Returns directional actions [“up”,”down”,”right”,”left”], 2D numpy array state, and float reward

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_continuous_light_dark_pomdp_main_example()[source]

Test the main ContinuousLightDarkPOMDP class example.

Purpose: Validates that ContinuousLightDarkPOMDP environment can be created and basic functionality works correctly

Given: A ContinuousLightDarkPOMDP environment with goal_state=[10,5], start_state=[0,5], reward_model_type=STANDARD When: Initial state sampling, continuous action application, reward calculation, and goal state detection are tested Then: Returns 2D numpy array state, 2D numpy array action, float reward, and boolean goal state flag

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_mountain_car_pomdp_main_example()[source]

Test the main MountainCarPOMDP class example.

Purpose: Validates that MountainCarPOMDP environment can be created and basic functionality works correctly

Given: A MountainCarPOMDP environment with discount_factor=0.99 When: Initial state sampling, action selection, reward calculation, and goal state detection are tested Then: Returns 2D numpy array state [position, velocity], valid actions [-1,0,1], float reward, and boolean goal state flag

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_push_pomdp_main_example()[source]

Test the main PushPOMDP class example.

Purpose: Validates that PushPOMDP environment can be created and basic functionality works correctly

Given: A PushPOMDP environment with grid_size=10, push_threshold=1.0, friction_coefficient=0.3, observation_noise=0.1 When: Initial state sampling, action selection, reward calculation, and target state detection are tested Then: Returns 6D numpy array state, directional actions [“up”,”down”,”right”,”left”], float reward, and boolean target state flag

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_safety_ant_velocity_pomdp_main_example()[source]

Test the main SafeAntVelocityPOMDP class example.

Purpose: Validates that SafeAntVelocityPOMDP environment can be created and basic functionality works correctly

Given: A SafeAntVelocityPOMDP environment with safe_velocity_threshold=2.0, safety_violation_penalty=-100.0, movement_reward_scale=1.0 When: Initial state sampling, action selection, reward calculation, and safety constraint checking are tested Then: Returns 4D numpy array state [x,y,vx,vy], valid actions [0,1,2,3], float reward, and boolean safety flag based on velocity threshold

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_sanity_pomdp_main_example()[source]

Test the main SanityPOMDP class example.

Purpose: Validates that SanityPOMDP environment can be created and basic functionality works correctly

Given: A SanityPOMDP environment with discount_factor=0.95 When: Environment actions, state transitions, rewards, and observations are tested Then: Returns correct actions [0,1], deterministic transitions, rewards (1.0 for good state, 1.0 for bad state), and perfect observability

Test type: example

POMDPPlanners.tests.test_environments.test_all_environment_examples.test_tiger_pomdp_main_example()[source]

Test the main TigerPOMDP class example.

Purpose: Validates that TigerPOMDP environment can be created and basic functionality works correctly

Given: A TigerPOMDP environment with discount_factor=0.95 When: Initial state distribution, actions, rewards, and terminal conditions are tested Then: Returns valid states (tiger_left/tiger_right), actions (listen/open_left/open_right), correct reward for listen (-1.0), and non-terminal states

Test type: example
